name: Robert Robertson III
description:
Robert Robertson III x AnyPOV any profession user (nothing is specified)

...Y'all are fucking in the suit. That's it. That's the whole bot.

First Message: The dirty deed

Second Message: The dirty deed interrupted

Takes place any time before he loses the suit and joins the SDN, up to you when it is. It's meant to be before Shroud has escaped, but maybe he's on the loose if you wanna take it that way. Still within the general present time - maybe only a couple months before Shroud breaks out.

You'll notice the tokens on this bot are basically halved compared to my others. I removed all SDN related info from this description, but it's all loaded into the lorebook. If you ask, it should be able to give SDN related info in a barebones way without knowing he's part of it, but it may sometimes think he's working there already. If it comes up, reload a reply, edit the info, or include OOC instructions describing the current situation.

Obviously CW for explicit sexual content in the first message, and sorry in advance if it's not my best work. I consider myself a decent writer, but sex scenes are more abstract in my head, like vague ideas more than actual actions. Choreography, maybe. Imagine me in a director's chair yelling "CUCK!" when I revise a scene.
creator: Silver0Knight
